content.problemStatement:
**Goal:** To create a professional, elegant coffee shop menu by applying typography properties including `font-family`, `font-size`, `line-height`, `font-weight`, `text-align`, `text-transform`, `text-decoration`, and `text-shadow`.

---
**Instructions**

**Step 1. Hero Heading - "Brew & Bean"**
- Select the `.hero h1` element.  
- Choose an elegant serif font from Google Fonts (like *Playfair Display*, *Merriweather*, or similar) (`font-family`).  
- Make it large and bold with an appropriate size (`font-size`, `font-weight`).  
- Transform the text to **uppercase** for impact (`text-transform`).  
- Add depth with a subtle shadow (`text-shadow`).  

**Step 2. Hero Tagline - "Artisan Coffee Since 2010"**
- Select the `.hero .tagline` element.  
- Use a clean sans-serif font (like *Lato*, *Open Sans*, *Roboto*, or similar) (`font-family`).  
- Set a medium readable size (`font-size`).  
- Transform text to **uppercase** for consistency (`text-transform`).  
- Improve readability with generous spacing (`line-height`).  

**Step 3. Welcome Message Paragraph**
- Select the `.hero .welcome` element.  
- Keep it consistent with a sans-serif font (`font-family`).  
- Use a comfortable size for body text (`font-size`).  
- Add open, welcoming spacing (`line-height`).  

**Step 4. Section Headings - "Signature Drinks" & "Classic Favorites"**
- Select the `.menu-section h2` elements.  
- Use an elegant serif font for sophistication (`font-family`).  
- Make them prominent with a larger size than body text (`font-size`).  
- Apply a warm brown shade for theme consistency (`color`).  
- Center-align the headings (`text-align`).  
- Add breathing space below the heading (`margin-bottom`).  

**Step 5. Menu Item Names**
- Select the `.item-name` class.  
- Use a serif font for sophistication (`font-family`).  
- Set a size that stands out from descriptions (`font-size`).  
- Make them bold (`font-weight`).  
- Use a coffee-toned brown color (`color`).  

**Step 6. Price Styling**
- Select the `.price` class.  
- Use a clean sans-serif font for modern numbers (`font-family`).  
- Make them clearly visible with readable size (`font-size`).  
- Apply a golden-brown or bronze shade (`color`).  

**Step 7. Menu Item Descriptions**
- Select the `.description` class.  
- Keep it simple with a sans-serif font (`font-family`).  
- Use a smaller size than the item names (`font-size`).  
- Apply a subtle gray shade for secondary emphasis (`color`).  
- Improve readability with comfortable spacing (`line-height`).  

**Step 8. Footer Heading - "Visit Us Today"**
- Select the `.footer h3` element.  
- Use a serif font to match other headings (`font-family`).  
- Set a noticeable size for emphasis (`font-size`).  
- Transform the text to **uppercase** for impact (`text-transform`).  

**Step 9. Footer Paragraphs**
- Select the `.footer p` elements.  
- Use a clean sans-serif font (`font-family`).  
- Make it readable with proper sizing (`font-size`).  
- Add breathing space for comfort (`line-height`).  

**Step 10. Hours Text - Special Emphasis**
- Select the `.hours` class.  
- Add a highlight effect with underlining or styling (`text-decoration`).  

---
**Expected output**
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $T$, denoting the number of test cases.
- Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.
    - The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers $N$ and $M$ — the number of vertices and edges of the graph, respectively.
    - The next $M$ lines describe the edges. The $i$-th of these $M$ lines contains two space-separated integers $u_i$ and $v_i$, denoting an edge between $u_i$ and $v_i$.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output on a new line the number of good subgraphs of $G$, modulo $10^9 + 7$.
